title_en: Ibn Nujaym al-Misri: Life and Scholarly Formation
title_ar: Ibn Nujaym al-Misri: Life and Scholarly Formation
title_id: Ibn Nujaym al-Mishri: Kehidupan dan Pembentukan Keilmuan
content_en:
Zayn ad-Din Ibrahim ibn Muhammad ibn Ibrahim ibn Nujaym al-Misri al-Hanafi was born in Egypt around 926 AH (1520 CE). He is one of the most important Hanafi jurists of the Ottoman period and is celebrated for combining deep mastery of the Hanafi legal tradition with an exceptional command of the principles of jurisprudence (usul al-fiqh) and legal maxims (qawa'id fiqhiyya). His family was from Egypt and he received his education in Cairo, studying under the leading Hanafi scholars of his era.

Ibn Nujaym lived during the height of Ottoman rule in Egypt, when Cairo was a major administrative and scholarly center of the empire. The Hanafi madhab was the official legal school of the Ottoman state, and scholars of Hanafi jurisprudence occupied the most prestigious positions in the judicial and educational hierarchies. Ibn Nujaym's mastery of Hanafi law gave him both scholarly prestige and practical authority in the legal environment of Ottoman Cairo.

His scholarly output reflects the characteristic concerns of Hanafi scholarship in the Ottoman period: deep engagement with the authoritative texts of the madhab, systematic treatment of legal principles and maxims, and attention to the practical application of the law in commercial and family matters. Al-Bahr ar-Ra'iq is his most comprehensive legal work, but his al-Ashbah wan-Nazair — a systematic treatment of Hanafi legal maxims — is equally celebrated and has been even more widely studied.

He died in Cairo in 970 AH (1563 CE). His works, particularly al-Ashbah wan-Nazair and al-Bahr ar-Ra'iq, established him as one of the principal voices of the Ottoman-era Hanafi tradition and secured his position as a permanent reference in Hanafi legal education. The combination of these two works — one addressing substantive legal rulings in detail, the other providing the theoretical framework of legal maxims — gave students who studied both a comprehensive foundation in Hanafi jurisprudence. Ibn Nujaym's influence on the later Ottoman legal tradition was thus both practical and theoretical, shaping how scholars understood and applied the Hanafi madhab across the vast territories of the Ottoman state.
content_id:
Zayn al-Din Ibrahim ibn Muhammad ibn Ibrahim ibn Nujaym al-Mishri al-Hanafi lahir di Mesir sekitar tahun 926 H (1520 M). Beliau merupakan salah satu ulama fikih Hanafi terpenting pada periode Utsmaniyah dan dikenal karena memadukan penguasaan mendalam atas tradisi hukum Hanafi dengan keahlian luar biasa dalam usul al-fikih dan kaidah-kaidah fikih (qawa'id fiqhiyya). Keluarganya berasal dari Mesir dan beliau menempuh pendidikan di Kairo, belajar kepada ulama-ulama Hanafi terkemuka di zamannya.

Ibn Nujaym hidup pada puncak kekuasaan Utsmaniyah di Mesir, ketika Kairo menjadi pusat administrasi dan keilmuan utama kekaisaran tersebut. Mazhab Hanafi adalah mazhab hukum resmi negara Utsmaniyah, dan para ulama fikih Hanafi menduduki posisi-posisi paling bergengsi dalam hierarki peradilan dan pendidikan. Penguasaan Ibn Nujaym atas hukum Hanafi memberikannya prestise ilmiah sekaligus otoritas praktis dalam lingkungan hukum Kairo Utsmaniyah.

Karya-karya ilmiahnya mencerminkan perhatian khas para ulama Hanafi pada periode Utsmaniyah: keterlibatan mendalam dengan teks-teks otoritatif mazhab, perlakuan sistematis atas prinsip-prinsip dan kaidah-kaidah hukum, serta perhatian terhadap penerapan praktis hukum dalam urusan perniagaan dan keluarga. Al-Bahr al-Ra'iq adalah karya hukum beliau yang paling komprehensif, namun Al-Ashbah wal-Naza'ir — perlakuan sistematis atas kaidah-kaidah fikih Hanafi — sama-sama termasyhur dan bahkan lebih luas dipelajari.

Beliau wafat di Kairo pada tahun 970 H (1563 M). Karya-karyanya, khususnya Al-Ashbah wal-Naza'ir dan Al-Bahr al-Ra'iq, menjadikannya salah satu suara utama tradisi Hanafi era Utsmaniyah dan memastikan posisinya sebagai referensi permanen dalam pendidikan hukum Hanafi. Perpaduan dua karya tersebut — satu membahas hukum-hukum substantif secara terperinci, yang lain menyediakan kerangka teoretis kaidah-kaidah fikih — memberikan fondasi komprehensif fikih Hanafi bagi para pelajar yang mempelajari keduanya. Pengaruh Ibn Nujaym terhadap tradisi hukum Utsmaniyah berikutnya bersifat praktis sekaligus teoretis, membentuk cara para ulama memahami dan menerapkan mazhab Hanafi di seluruh wilayah luas kekaisaran Utsmaniyah.
